_doc: Per-Decision-ID content fingerprints for the CURRENCY layer of the close-out gate. Each D-ID maps to a canonical SOURCE span; the gate hashes that span and requires the token '<D-ID>@<8-hex>' to appear in every canonical tracker. When the source content changes, the hash changes -> every tracker carrying the OLD token reads STALE (not GREEN) -> forces re-propagation of the refined result, not just first-close presence. D-IDs absent here fall back to presence-only (back-compatible).
